$comment: Public/internal documentation projection boundary — DOC-001 / ADR-0075. SINGLE SOURCE OF TRUTH for the boundary. Consumed by docs-public-lint.mjs (DOC-005) and selfcheck-docs.mjs (DOC-007). Internal lineage (contextkit/memory/**) is intentionally NOT a public path and keeps its ADR + inspiration references untouched.

bannedTokens.reason: Inspiration name — credit only in ACKNOWLEDGEMENTS.md, never in user-facing prose.
Inspiration name — credit only in ACKNOWLEDGEMENTS.md, never in user-facing prose.
Public prose links to capability docs, not internal decision ids. Lineage stays in contextkit/memory/**. (Code blocks / inline code are exempt — a literal command may reference a decision file.)
Internal lineage path leaked into public prose. (Code blocks / inline code are exempt — a tutorial may show a literal path the reader runs.)

secretShaped.reason: Secret-shaped literal assignment — hard stop (the one place a false-pass is catastrophic).

allow.reason: ACKNOWLEDGEMENTS.md is the ONE sanctioned place to credit inspirations (ADR-0075). It is outside publicPaths, so the lint never scans it for inspiration names; this entry records the exception explicitly.
